description: Functional bug fixes discovered during automated QA testing cycle.

userStories.title: Fix Tip Calculator Input Validation (Negative & Invalid Characters)
userStories.description: As a user, I should not be able to enter negative numbers for my bill amount or tip percentage, nor should I be able to enter invalid characters which breaks the calculator logic resulting in negative outputs.
acceptanceCriteria: Update HTML input types to strictly enforce minimum values of 0 using min='0'.
Add JS validation to explicitly prevent calculating negative total bills or tips.
Add JS regex or keydown filtering to prevent invalid math sequences (e.g. '11-2') in the 'Number of People' field.
Ensure keyboard shortcuts for clearing fields (Ctrl+A/Cmd+A + Backspace) do not break the calculation state.
